tasks.subject: Task 1: External-redirect breaker decision helper + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure Crawlee-free shouldTripExternalRedirectBreaker(external, processed, cfg)->{trip,reason} + full unit tests.

**Files:**
- Create: apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/externalRedirectBreaker.ts
- Test: apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/externalRedirectBreaker.test.ts

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && node --import tsx --test src/externalRedirectBreaker.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/externalRedirectBreaker.ts", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/externalRedirectBreaker.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && node --import tsx --test src/externalRedirectBreaker.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["below sample gate no trip", "ratio>=rate at gate trips", "ratio<rate no trip", "no divide-by-zero"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Config fields + fatalExitCode plumbing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 3 breaker config fields (defaults+CLI args), context.fatalExitCode, exit-code override at completion, surface external_redirects in payload.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/context.ts
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts (arg parse ~108-110, cb literal ~129-140, payload ~960-995, line 1342)

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/context.ts", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3 cfg fields + defaults", "fatalExitCode field", "CLI args parse", "1342 uses fatalExitCode ?? 2", "external_redirects in payload", "tsc passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Integrate breaker into external-redirect guard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** In routes.ts off-domain guard (update mode): increment external_redirects, homepage fast-path, ratio breaker via helper -> set stopReason/crawlErrorMessage/fatalExitCode=7 + stopCrawler.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/routes.ts (import top; guard 264-271)

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build && npm test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/routes.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["helper imported", "increments external_redirects", "homepage fast-path exit7", "ratio breaker exit7", "kill-switch no-op", "tsc + tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Python classify exit code 7 as domain_changed
tasks.description:
**Goal:** _classify_exit_code(7) -> (msg, 'domain_changed') + add 7 to catch-all exclusion set; failure routing automatic via is_success.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py (_classify_exit_code 309-331)
- Create: apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_classify_exit_code_domain_changed.py

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_classify_exit_code_domain_changed.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_classify_exit_code_domain_changed.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_classify_exit_code_domain_changed.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exit7 -> domain_changed", "not unknown", "7 not in (0,2)", "0/2 still (None,None)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Document exit code 7 / domain_changed in CLAUDE.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add exit-code 7 row + domain_changed failure_cause row to crawler-service CLAUDE.md.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md (Exit Codes table + failure_cause vocabulary table)

**Verify:** grep -n domain_changed apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md -> >=2 matches

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n domain_changed apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exit-code row 7", "failure_cause domain_changed row"]}
```
